info.title: TNTC
info.description: TNTC is a command-line tool designed to help manage translations in .NET projects.

commands.name: extract
commands.description: Extract all strings from all sources and update the translations.

arguments.name: projectFolder
arguments.description: Project folder to look for project to translate withing. Any folder with a '.tnt' folder is a folder to be translated.

commands.name: upgrade-from-tnt
commands.description: Upgrade the existing TNT translations to the new json format

arguments.name: projectFolder
arguments.description: Project folder to look for project to translate withing. Any folder with a '.tnt' folder is a folder to be translated.
